---
title: "NHM Living Labs Urban Research Station Survey Protocol — Annual Tree Survey"
author:
  - name: Ed Baker
    affiliation: Natural History Museum, London
  - name: John Tweddle
    affiliation: Natural History Museum, London
citation:
  container-title: NHM Living Labs Reports
  issue: 2
date: "2025-10-05"
---
<!-- HTML-only download link (hidden in PDF) -->
::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
[![](/assets/images/icons/pdf.svg){width=24px height=auto style="vertical-align:middle;"}](/assets/pdfs/2_Published-Protocol_2025_Tree-Survey.pdf) [Download PDF](/assets/pdfs/2_Published-Protocol_2025_Tree-Survey.pdf)
:::

Describe
